targets.expr: sum(increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="input", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum(increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="output", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum(increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum(increase(ai_server_requests_seconds_count{ ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range])) or sum(increase(ai_server_requests_active_seconds_count{ ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.description: Total token usage per CF organization. Uses a join with container metrics to resolve org names from space GUIDs.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_org_name, gen_ai_token_type) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Organization

panels.description: Token usage over time grouped by CF organization.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_org_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[1h]))

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time by Organization (per hour)

panels.description: Total token usage per CF space. Uses a join to resolve space names.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name, gen_ai_token_type) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Org / Space

panels.description: Token usage over time grouped by CF space.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[1h]))

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time by Space (per hour)

panels.description: Token usage broken down by LLM model.

targets.expr: sum by(ai_server_advertised_model, gen_ai_token_type) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Token Usage by LLM Model

panels.description: Token usage over time by LLM model.

targets.expr: sum by(ai_server_advertised_model) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[1h]))

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time by Model (per hour)

panels.description: Token usage by AI service endpoint (plan). Each endpoint represents a service plan configuration.

targets.expr: sum by(ai_server_endpoint, gen_ai_token_type) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Service Endpoint (Plan)

panels.description: Token usage over time by service endpoint.

targets.expr: sum by(ai_server_endpoint) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[1h]))

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time by Endpoint (per hour)

panels.description: Token usage broken down by service instance GUID. Captures all consumption including service key usage.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_service_instance_name, gen_ai_token_type) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance", platform_cf_service_instance_guid!=""}[$__range]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Service Instance

panels.description: Token usage over time by service instance GUID.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_service_instance_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance", platform_cf_service_instance_guid!=""}[1h]))

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time by Service Instance (per hour)

panels.description: Token usage rolled up by organization and space for billing purposes.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="input", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="output", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Billback Summary by Organization / Space

panels.description: Detailed token usage breakdown by organization, space, model, and endpoint for billing purposes. Shows data for spaces with running apps (org/space name resolution via container metrics).

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name, ai_server_advertised_model, ai_server_endpoint, platform_cf_space_guid, platform_cf_service_instance_guid, platform_cf_service_instance_name, platform_cf_app_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="input", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name, ai_server_advertised_model, ai_server_endpoint, platform_cf_space_guid, platform_cf_service_instance_guid, platform_cf_service_instance_name, platform_cf_app_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="output", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum by(platform_cf_org_name, platform_cf_space_name, ai_server_advertised_model, ai_server_endpoint, platform_cf_space_guid, platform_cf_service_instance_guid, platform_cf_service_instance_name, platform_cf_app_name) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type!="total", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_org_name=~"$Organization", platform_cf_space_name=~"$Space", platform_cf_service_instance_name=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Detailed Billback Breakdown

panels.description: Complete token usage data including spaces without running apps (shown by GUID). This ensures no billing data is missed even when consuming apps are stopped.

targets.expr: sum by(platform_cf_space_guid, ai_server_advertised_model, ai_server_endpoint, platform_cf_service_instance_guid) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="input", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_service_instance_guid=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))

sum by(platform_cf_space_guid, ai_server_advertised_model, ai_server_endpoint, platform_cf_service_instance_guid) (increase(ai_server_client_token_usage_total{gen_ai_token_type="output", ai_server_advertised_model=~"$Model", ai_server_endpoint=~"$Endpoint", platform_cf_service_instance_guid=~"$ServiceInstance"}[$__range]))
